历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the lowest rank for science was approximately 104; in 2025, the lowest rank for physics category was approximately 104. The rankings have been highly stable over the past two years with no significant fluctuations. The baseline rank for 2025 is about 104. 学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 4th in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, consistently among the top universities in the country, maintaining strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct (high retraction volume) and school management issues, but Douyin popularity ranks 42/106 (relatively hot), overall attention remains high. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (science in Henan ranked last among the five prestigious universities), but it was a low-attention event with limited impact on Ningxia. It has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, and Electronic Information related disciplines A/A+, highly matching the enrollment majors, with extremely strong appeal of flagship programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Artificial Intelligence and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Shanghai Jiao Tong University's physics category enrollment majors (Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, Mechanical). With the boost of popular majors, application enthusiasm remains high. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 66,000 (including uncertainties), a significant increase from 44,491 in the physics category in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. In 2025, the university enrolled 12 students in Ningxia (including 4 from the medical school), accounting for about 2.0% of the total national enrollment of 598, with a relatively stable proportion in Ningxia.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 104, the sharp reduction in enrollment by about 54.5% in 2026 leading to significantly intensified competition, the increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the continued high popularity of hot majors, it is expected that the lowest rank for the physics category in 2026 will move significantly forward (number decreases). The predicted lowest rank is about 65, with a range of 60-70.
